mapper.select:
SELECT s.id ,s.adjust_log_id ,al.security_code ,al.target_pool_id ,al.target_pool_name ,al.adjust_batch_no ,s.id AS stepId ,f.name AS flowName ,s.node_label AS stepName ,CASE WHEN dst.category_type = 'company' AND al.target_pool_id IN (15, 16, 17) THEN 'forbiddenCompanyAdjust' ELSE 'securityAdjust' END AS businessScene ,al.audit_status ,s.step_status ,CONCAT( COALESCE(al.adjuster_name, ''), ' 将 ', COALESCE(al.security_short_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(al.adjust_mode, ''), ' ', COALESCE(al.target_pool_name, ''), ' 的审批申请' ) AS processDescription ,al.adjuster_name AS initiatorName ,s.start_time FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = al.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0
INNER JOIN ( SELECT adjust_log_id ,MAX(id) AS step_id FROM ip_adjust_step
step_status = 'pending'
AND handler_id = #{currentUserId}
AND 1 = 0
GROUP BY adjust_log_id ) latest ON latest.adjust_log_id = al.id
INNER JOIN ( SELECT adjust_log_id ,MAX(id) AS step_id FROM ip_adjust_step GROUP BY adjust_log_id ) latest ON latest.adjust_log_id = al.id
INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.id = latest.step_id LEFT JOIN wf_flow_node n ON n.id = s.flow_node_id LEFT JOIN wf_flow_definition f ON f.id = n.flow_id AND f.is_deleted = 0
al.is_deleted = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_adjust_step us WHERE us.adjust_log_id = al.id AND us.handler_id = #{currentUserId} )
AND f.id IN
#{flowId}
AND s.start_time >= CONCAT(#{startDateStart}, ' 00:00:00')
AND s.start_time <= CONCAT(#{startDateEnd}, ' 23:59:59')
AND CONCAT( COALESCE(al.adjuster_name, ''), ' 将 ', COALESCE(al.security_short_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(al.adjust_mode, ''), ' ', COALESCE(al.target_pool_name, ''), ' 的审批申请' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{processDescription}, '%')
AND al.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_adjust_step ps WHERE ps.step_status = 'pending' AND ps.adjust_batch_no = al.adjust_batch_no )
AND al.adjuster_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{initiatorName}, '%')
GROUP BY s.adjust_log_id ORDER BY s.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT f.id AS flowId ,f.flow_key ,f.name AS flowName ,f.description FROM ip_adjust_log al INNER JOIN ( SELECT adjust_log_id ,MAX(id) AS step_id FROM ip_adjust_step GROUP BY adjust_log_id ) latest ON latest.adjust_log_id = al.id INNER JOIN ip_adjust_step s ON s.id = latest.step_id INNER JOIN wf_flow_node n ON n.id = s.flow_node_id INNER JOIN wf_flow_definition f ON f.id = n.flow_id AND f.is_deleted = 0
al.is_deleted = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ip_adjust_step us WHERE us.adjust_log_id = al.id AND us.handler_id = #{currentUserId} )
ORDER BY f.name ASC ,f.id ASC
